title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXVI. Relics.
content:
Willy boy, Willy boy, where are you going?
            I'll go with you, if I may.
        I'm going to the meadow to see them a mowing,
            I'm going to help them make hay.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXXVI. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
